title: My Series Title
premise: A 2-3 sentence description of what the series is about. This is the core idea.
tone: e.g. whimsical, dark, comedic, heartfelt, mysterious
visual_style: e.g. anime, watercolor, cyberpunk, studio ghibli, pixel art
setting: Where and when the series takes place. Be descriptive.
season_arc: What is the overarching story across all 20 episodes? What changes from episode 1 to 20?
